meaning: n.(人和物产生的)灵气,(神像头上的)光轮
examples: We are overshadowed by a nimbus of ideas.
And then he vanishes in a nimbus of energy.
One expert panel debated a nimbus cloud theory.
Data from Nimbus-2 and -3, covering 1966 to 1972, is now being investigated.
Once in print Howard's theory spread like a mass of nimbus clouds in a tropical storm.
